Name: NPC_ARENA_GAME_EFFECT_PARAM_ST
Description: Defines NPC arena in-match UI and display parameters.

Fields.Name: Win/Loss Cutscene Delay
Fields.Description: Delay before cutscene playback after win/loss.

Fields.Name: Win/Loss Text Duration
Fields.Description: Duration to display win/loss dialogue, in seconds.

Fields.Name: Player Death: Text ID
Fields.Description: Text to display on player destruction.

Fields.Name: Player Death: Text Duration
Fields.Description: Duration to display text after player destruction, in seconds.

Fields.Name: Enemy Death: Text ID
Fields.Description: Text to display on enemy destruction.

Fields.Name: Enemy Death: Text Duration
Fields.Description: Duration to display text after enemy destruction, in seconds.
